query: SELECT deviceId, COUNT(*) as cycle_count, SUM(totalPuzzles) as total_puzzles, MAX(completedAt) as last_completed FROM cycle_history GROUP BY deviceId ORDER BY total_puzzles DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT deviceId, COUNT(*) as cycle_count, SUM(totalPuzzles) as total_puzzles, MAX(completedAt) as last_completed FROM cycle_history GROUP BY deviceId ORDER BY total_puzzles DESC LIMIT 20;
